segments.text: I will sing of the Lord's great love forever; with my mouth I will make your faithfulness known through all generations.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will declare that your love stands firm forever, that you have established your faithfulness in heaven itself.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You said,
I have made a covenant with my chosen one, I have sworn to David my servant,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will establish your line forever and make your throne firm through all generations.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The heavens praise your wonders, Lord, your faithfulness too, in the assembly of the holy ones.
For who in the skies above can compare with the Lord? Who is like the Lord among the heavenly beings?
In the council of the holy ones God is greatly feared; he is more awesome than all who surround him.
Who is like you, Lord God Almighty? You, Lord, are mighty, and your faithfulness surrounds you.
You rule over the surging sea; when its waves mount up, you still them.
You crushed Rahab like one of the slain; with your strong arm you scattered your enemies.
The heavens are yours, and yours also the earth; you founded the world and all that is in it.
You created the north and the south; Tabor and Hermon sing for joy at your name.
Your arm is endowed with power; your hand is strong, your right hand exalted.
Righteousness and justice are the foundation of your throne; love and faithfulness go before you.
Blessed are those who have learned to acclaim you, who walk in the light of your presence, Lord.
They rejoice in your name all day long; they celebrate your righteousness.
For you are their glory and strength, and by your favor you exalt our horn.
Indeed, our shield belongs to the Lord, our king to the Holy One of Israel.
Once you spoke in a vision, to your faithful people you said:
I have bestowed strength on a warrior; I have raised up a young man from among the people.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I have found David my servant; with my sacred oil I have anointed him.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: My hand will sustain him; surely my arm will strengthen him.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The enemy will not get the better of him; the wicked will not oppress him.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will crush his foes before him and strike down his adversaries.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: My faithful love will be with him, and through my name his horn will be exalted.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will set his hand over the sea, his right hand over the rivers.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He will call out to me, 'You are my Father, my God, the Rock my Savior.'
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And I will appoint him to be my firstborn, the most exalted of the kings of the earth.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will maintain my love to him forever, and my covenant with him will never fail.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will establish his line forever, his throne as long as the heavens endure.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: If his sons forsake my law and do not follow my statutes,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: if they violate my decrees and fail to keep my commands,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will punish their sin with the rod, their iniquity with flogging;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: but I will not take my love from him, nor will I ever betray my faithfulness.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will not violate my covenant or alter what my lips have uttered.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Once for all, I have sworn by my holiness— and I will not lie to David—
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: that his line will continue forever and his throne endure before me like the sun;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: it will be established forever like the moon, the faithful witness in the sky.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: But you have rejected, you have spurned, you have been very angry with your anointed one.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have renounced the covenant with your servant and have defiled his crown in the dust.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have broken through all his walls and reduced his strongholds to ruins.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: All who pass by have plundered him; he has become the scorn of his neighbors.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have exalted the right hand of his foes; you have made all his enemies rejoice.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Indeed, you have turned back the edge of his sword and have not supported him in battle.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have put an end to his splendor and cast his throne to the ground.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have cut short the days of his youth; you have covered him with a mantle of shame.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: How long, Lord? Will you hide yourself forever? How long will your wrath burn like fire?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Remember how fleeting is my life. For what futility you have created all humanity!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Who can live and not see death, or who can escape the power of the grave?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Lord, where is your former great love, which in your faithfulness you swore to David?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Remember, Lord, how your servant has been mocked, how I bear in my heart the taunts of all the nations,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: the taunts with which your enemies, Lord, have mocked, with which they have mocked every step of your anointed one.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Praise be to the Lord forever! Amen and Amen.
segments.speaker: David
